instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `inline-test` that compares an expected value against an actual expression with EQUAL and prints PASS or FAIL with diagnostic detail to *trace-output*. Each side is evaluated exactly once.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 3) (#:G2 (+ 1 2)))
            (IF (EQUAL #:G1 #:G2)
                (FORMAT *TRACE-OUTPUT* "~&PASS ~A~%" "addition")
                (FORMAT *TRACE-OUTPUT* "~&FAIL ~A: expected ~S got ~S~%"
                        "addition" #:G1 #:G2)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 3) (#:G113 (+ 1 2)))
            (IF (EQUAL #:G112 #:G113)
                (FORMAT *TRACE-OUTPUT* "~&PASS ~A~%" "addition")
                (FORMAT *TRACE-OUTPUT* "~&FAIL ~A: expected ~S got ~S~%"
                        "addition" #:G112 #:G113)))

--- stderr ---
